$comment: Base harness settings deployed by setup-project-ai (permissions only). The generator adds stack-specific Bash allow entries (pytest/npm/etc.) based on detection. HOOKS ARE NOT DEFINED HERE: the harness loop hooks (relay.md resume, agent-log, session-end nudge, auto-lint) ship with the claudster plugin via plugin/hooks/hooks.json and auto-activate on install — defining them here too would double-fire and re-introduce machine-specific paths. Pipeline MCP server is NOT registered by default — the lightweight loop (plan file + relay) is the default. To enable the optional pipeline power-mode, add an mcpServers.junai entry pointing at the FastMCP server plus a .github/pipeline-state.json.
$comment_permissions: IMPORTANT: any entry in `ask` overrides bypassPermissions (yolo) mode and forces a prompt every time, even when the user has opted into no-prompts. Keep `ask` empty (or as minimal as possible) so bypassPermissions actually bypasses. `Bash(git push:*)` was moved out of `ask` into `allow` for exactly this reason — it was forcing a push prompt on every /ship under bypassPermissions.
